TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Chris Bosh == Chris Bosh hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 3, Chris Bosh, squliq na p'unro. squ kawas tay 2019, wal malax squ Chris Bosh. Chris Bosh hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. qnxan nya(qyanux nya ) Chris Bosh htagan beh sa t'k'sasco talass.mrkyas beh hacys.Chris Bosh ru sswe mlikuy (joel) krryax mzyu mari maki ngasal.(Joel hiya Bosh sswe mlikuy.) trang payat kawas nya, aring mqbaq mzyu mari maki yaba pqnahan. baha hmswa wagiq balay inqyasan nya,yasa thoyay maku mzyu mari kryax. Bosh si ki tehok pqwasan laqi cikuy aring mqbaq mzyu mari smsum mpspung cyux maki lingay ngasal yaki mu. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Chris Bosh sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. kingpay na tkura' mari' na mmlikuy sa kawas tay (2008) na Olympic Games. champion NBA(2012,2013). cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ == ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ taj ****, wal malax s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ. ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ ħja ɣa wal malax s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnaw mari na amirika. qnxan nja(qjanux nja ) ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa tʔkʔs~ɕas~ɕʦ~ʨo talas~ɕs~ɕ.mrkjas~ɕ βeħ ħaʦ~ʨjs~ɕ.ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ ru s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj (joel) krrjax mzju mari maki ŋas~ɕal.(*oel ħija βos~ɕħ s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj.) traŋ pajat kawas~ɕ nja, ariŋ mqβaq mzju mari maki jaβa pqnaħan. βaħa ħms~ɕwa waɣiq βalaj inqjas~ɕan nja,jas~ɕa tħojaj maku mzju mari krjax. βos~ɕħ s~ɕi ki teħok pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ariŋ mqβaq mzju mari s~ɕms~ɕum mps~ɕpuŋ ʦ~ʨjux maki liŋaj ŋas~ɕal jaki mu. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ rjax qnxan nqu ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ s~ɕa s~ɕenmuŋ pɣnawɣan mariʔ. kiŋpaj na tkuraʔ mariʔ na mmlikuj s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj (****) na oljmpiʦ~ʨ ɣames~ɕ. ʦ~ʨħampion nβa(****,****). ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: == Chris Bosh == Chris Bosh hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 3, Chris Bosh, squliq na p'unro. squ kawas tay 2019, wal malax squ Chris Bosh. Chris Bosh hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. qnxan nya(qyanux nya ) Chris Bosh htagan beh sa t'k'sasco talass.mrkyas beh hacys.Chris Bosh ru sswe mlikuy (joel) krryax mzyu mari maki ngasal.(Joel hiya Bosh sswe mlikuy.) trang payat kawas nya, aring mqbaq mzyu mari maki yaba pqnahan. baha hmswa wagiq balay inqyasan nya,yasa thoyay maku mzyu mari kryax. Bosh si ki tehok pqwasan laqi cikuy aring mqbaq mzyu mari smsum mpspung cyux maki lingay ngasal yaki mu. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Chris Bosh sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. kingpay na tkura' mari' na mmlikuy sa kawas tay (2008) na Olympic Games. champion NBA(2012,2013). cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ == ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ taj ****, wal malax s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ. ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ ħja ɣa wal malax s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnaw mari na amirika. qnxan nja(qjanux nja ) ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa tʔkʔs~ɕas~ɕʦ~ʨo talas~ɕs~ɕ.mrkjas~ɕ βeħ ħaʦ~ʨjs~ɕ.ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ ru s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj (joel) krrjax mzju mari maki ŋas~ɕal.(*oel ħija βos~ɕħ s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj.) traŋ pajat kawas~ɕ nja, ariŋ mqβaq mzju mari maki jaβa pqnaħan. βaħa ħms~ɕwa waɣiq βalaj inqjas~ɕan nja,jas~ɕa tħojaj maku mzju mari krjax. βos~ɕħ s~ɕi ki teħok pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj ariŋ mqβaq mzju mari s~ɕms~ɕum mps~ɕpuŋ ʦ~ʨjux maki liŋaj ŋas~ɕal jaki mu. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ rjax qnxan nqu ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ βos~ɕħ s~ɕa s~ɕenmuŋ pɣnawɣan mariʔ. kiŋpaj na tkuraʔ mariʔ na mmlikuj s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj (****) na oljmpiʦ~ʨ ɣames~ɕ. ʦ~ʨħampion nβa(****,****). ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
